calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment And Setting Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jessica L. Lemoine; Declaration Of Terry Villegas Pursuant To C.C.P. 585; (Proposed} Order, Judgment
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Scott Gursky, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, L.A. Commercial Group, Inc., a Corporation dba Continental Commercial Group.
Noting a waiver of appearance was requested and the fee was paid, Court granted waiver of a witness.
Defaulted defendant Zaid Rahmani appeared.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $34,053.78
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,505.40
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $677.63
Total Judgment in the amount of $47,061.81.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Continued To Sep-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
